description: Dynamic bridge between scheduled runs. Each run reads this file, applies its learnings, does its work, then OVERWRITES this file with updated context for the next run. This is the memory of the intelligence system.

pattern_alerts.description: Geopolitical binary underweighting — markets price best-case scenarios sooner than consensus forecasts
Defense sector duration premium — maximized in 2-6 week ceasefire (managed tension), not instant peace

framework_updates_implemented.name: Geopolitical Binary Underweighting
framework_updates_implemented.rule: For any 3-outcome binary forecast, include explicit REVERSAL TRIGGER: 'If best-case materializes → regime flips, index +2-4%'. Do not rely on probability weighting alone.

framework_updates_implemented.name: Defense Sector Duration Premium
framework_updates_implemented.rule: Before making defense stock predictions, model the DURATION of tension. 2-6 weeks managed tension = HOLD/ADD defense. Instant peace = REDUCE defense. Acute escalation = defense spikes then reverses.

framework_updates_implemented.name: Central Bank Calendar Synchronization
framework_updates_implemented.rule: Always check RBI/Fed meeting calendar when forecasting on binary geopolitical event days. Same-day policy decisions can amplify moves by 1-2%.

framework_updates_pending.name: Gold Pre-Binary-Event Hedging
framework_updates_pending.observation: SETFGOLD at ₹128.21 on April 9 morning — UP from ₹125.59 close despite ceasefire. Pattern: gold retains / temporarily elevates ahead of binary geopolitical events as hedging demand increases. This is a SELL SIGNAL (exit into the hedge-demand premium) rather than a hold signal.

prompt_for_morning_brief:
You are an expert market intelligence agent. Today is {{DATE}}. THE ISLAMABAD TALKS JUST HAPPENED (April 10). This is the #1 regime-defining event.

FIRST ACTION — BEFORE ANYTHING ELSE:
- Search 'Islamabad talks outcome April 10 2026' and 'US Iran peace talks result April 10'
- Determine which scenario played out: TALKS_PROGRESS (ceasefire extended), TALKS_NEUTRAL (ongoing), TALKS_FAIL (breakdown)
- Apply the regime decision tree from actions.json market_actions → MA002

SECOND CRITICAL CHECK:
- TCS Q4FY26 results were announced April 9 post-market. What were the actual numbers? Revenue vs ₹69,932 cr est., EBIT margin vs 25.3%, FY27 guidance, deal TCV. Score P018 (TCS >₹2,600).
- What is TCS opening April 10? What is Nifty IT sector doing?

CONTEXT FROM APRIL 9 EOD (expected — check if EOD wrap updated this):
- Nifty April 9 likely closed near 23,800-23,950 (consolidation session)
- SETFGOLD at ~₹128.21 (A005 exit window open — did user execute?)
- ASTRA MICRO at ~₹1,019 (partial profit limit set at ₹1,048-1,052?)

REGIME DECISION TREE FOR ISLAMABAD TALKS:
- TALKS_PROGRESS → DE-ESCALATION_DEEPENING: Extend ADANI PORT (P019), accelerate SETFGOLD exit. ASTRA MICRO may sell off — watch for ₹980-1,000 support. Nifty gap-up.
- TALKS_NEUTRAL → DE-ESCALATION_REAL continues: Maintain all positions. Focus on TCS Q4 results impact. Next review: ceasefire expiry April 22.
- TALKS_FAIL → WAR_PREMIUM_RETURN: CRITICAL — Re-activate A002 (INDIGO SELL trigger). Hold ALL SETFGOLD. ASTRA MICRO new high potential. Nifty gap-down -2-4%. Brent spikes above $100.

PREDICTIONS APPROACHING CHECK DATES:
- P012 (ASTRA MICRO ₹1,050-1,080): check April 14 — 4 days. Will talks outcome affect?
- P013 (INDIGO <₹4,100): check April 14 — WILL SCORE WRONG
- P015 (INDIGO >₹4,150): check April 15 — WILL SCORE RIGHT
- P016 (Nifty 23,900-24,100): check April 15 — talks outcome determines
- P018 (TCS >₹2,600): check April 15 — TCS results determine
- P019 (ADANI PORT ₹1,490-1,540): check April 15 — talks progress determines
- P020 (SETFGOLD ₹120-122): check April 15 — talks progress determines

FRAMEWORK: Apply FORECAST_PAT003 (3-outcome binary underweighting) to morning forecast. Apply M012 (defense duration premium) to ASTRA MICRO assessment.

NOTE: Do NOT run any git commands. Files saved to the workspace folder are automatically synced to GitHub by sync.sh (runs every 5 minutes on the host machine).
prompt_for_eod_wrap:
You are an expert market intelligence agent. Run the end-of-day wrap for {{DATE}}.

FIRST: Read data/next-run-context.json for full context.

CRITICAL CHECKS FOR THIS EOD RUN:
1. TCS Q4FY26 results announced ~4 PM April 9 — score P018 (TCS >₹2,600). RIGHT or WRONG? What were actual numbers?
2. Nifty April 9 close — confirm within range 23,700-24,050? Score April 9 session forecast.
3. SETFGOLD closing price — did A005 partial exit get executed? What price?
4. ASTRA MICRO closing price — did ₹1,048-1,052 limit order execute?
5. FII April 8 official flows — confirmed net buying or selling?
6. Islamabad talks setup news — any pre-signals of April 10 outcome?

STEPS:
1. Search: 'TCS Q4 results actual April 9 2026', 'India Nifty close April 9 2026'
2. Score P018 based on TCS results
3. Finalize April 9 session forecast score in market-forecasts.json
4. Update open prediction confidences based on TCS results + session close
5. Generate new predictions based on TCS outcome (P021 onwards)
6. Generate April 10 session forecast (BINARY_VOLATILE — already generated, refine)
7. Write EOD brief to daily-briefings/2026-04-09-eod.md
8. Update next-run-context.json (LAST STEP)

KEY NOTE: April 10 morning brief will be entirely dominated by Islamabad talks outcome. The EOD wrap tonight should prepare the full decision tree for each outcome so the morning brief runs fast.

CRITICAL NOTE: Do NOT run git commands. sync.sh handles git add/commit/push automatically every 5 minutes on the host machine. Just save files to the workspace folder.
